title: liparis kumokiri subsp. nemoralis
intro: Liparis kumokiri subsp. nemoralis, also known as a type of orchid, is a plant species that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Liparis kumokiri subsp. nemoralis include its potential to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing and reduce fever. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
